_mix: 5 instrumentaux / 5 avec paroles — mix intelligent genres & moods

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Windows down and the radio loud
Dust clouds rising on this back road out
Sun on my skin and the wind in my hair
Don't know where I'm going, don't even care

[Pre-Chorus]
Left the city lights behind
Found a little peace of mind
On this summer highway

[Chorus]
Summer highway, take me far away
Past the county line where the tall grass sways
Summer highway, golden all the way
This is where I find myself on a perfect day
Summer highway, summer highway

[Verse 2]
Gas station coffee in a paper cup
Best friend riding shotgun, we ain't giving up
Wildflowers blooming on the side of the road
Every mile lighter, letting go of the load

[Pre-Chorus]
Left the city lights behind
Found a little peace of mind
On this summer highway

[Chorus]
Summer highway, take me far away
Past the county line where the tall grass sways
Summer highway, golden all the way
This is where I find myself on a perfect day
Summer highway, summer highway

[Bridge]
Maybe I'll come back in September
Maybe I won't
Right now all I know
Is the road ahead and the sunset glow

[Outro]
Summer highway, summer highway
Take me home, take me far away

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Walls closing in and the static grows
White noise screaming in the undertow
Pressure building since the day I was born
Rip the wires out and rewrite the form

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm done playing by the rules
Done being someone's tool

[Chorus]
Break the static, break the noise
Tear it down and find your voice
Break the static, break the chain
Nothing left to lose but pain
Break the static

[Verse 2]
Screen glitch anthem for the ones who rage
Every day feels like another cage
Fists up heavy and the bass drops low
Light the signal let the whole world know

[Pre-Chorus]
I'm done playing by the rules
Done being someone's tool

[Chorus]
Break the static, break the noise
Tear it down and find your voice
Break the static, break the chain
Nothing left to lose but pain
Break the static

[Bridge]
(Breakdown)
Static — static — static — BREAK
This is not a drill, we don't negotiate

[Outro]
Break the static, break the static
We are the signal, we are the static

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Neon lights flash, midnight in Gangnam
Dancing through the crowd like I don't give a damn
Mirror mirror tell me who's the star
In this city we shine brighter than the boulevard

[Pre-Chorus]
Turn it up, feel the rhythm take control
Every heartbeat syncs with Seoul
We own the night

[Chorus]
Neon Seoul, neon soul
Lights are flashing and we're losing control
Neon Seoul, watch us glow
On the dance floor stealing every single show
Ne-ne-neon Seoul

[Verse 2]
Polaroid memories of rooftop skies
Soju nights and a hundred butterflies
Fashion forward in a world that moves so fast
Make every moment count and make it last

[Pre-Chorus]
Turn it up, feel the rhythm take control
Every heartbeat syncs with Seoul
We own the night

[Chorus]
Neon Seoul, neon soul
Lights are flashing and we're losing control
Neon Seoul, watch us glow
On the dance floor stealing every single show
Ne-ne-neon Seoul

[Bridge]
Hana dul set — turn it up
Every move electric and we can't get enough
서울의 밤은 우리 거야
Tonight the city lights belong to us

[Outro]
Neon Seoul, neon Seoul
We are the lights that never fade

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Five AM alarm, no snooze, I'm locked in
Cold water on my face, new day I'm walking in
Spreadsheets and espresso while the city still sleeps
Building something real while the whole world dreams

[Pre-Chorus]
They said it was impossible
Watch me make it possible
Every no just fuels the fire

[Chorus]
First million on my mind, I'm grinding every day
No shortcuts and no handouts, I'm gonna find a way
First million on my mind, the vision crystal clear
Turning late nights into legacy, the future starts right here

[Verse 2]
Laptop in the trenches, WiFi in the café
Pitch deck number fifty, they gon' hear what I say
Took the risk they wouldn't take, bet they wish they did
Self-made on the resume, that's how legends live

[Pre-Chorus]
They said it was impossible
Watch me make it possible
Every no just fuels the fire

[Chorus]
First million on my mind, I'm grinding every day
No shortcuts and no handouts, I'm gonna find a way
First million on my mind, the vision crystal clear
Turning late nights into legacy, the future starts right here

[Bridge]
Remember when they laughed
Remember when they doubted
Now they're watching from the sidelines
While I'm counting what I've founded

[Outro]
First million, then ten
Then we do it all again
Assirem, let's go

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Rain against the window pane
A cup of tea and no one to explain
The world is quiet for a little while
Dog-eared pages make me smile

[Chorus]
Pages turning, slowly learning
All the lives I'll never lead
Pages turning, softly burning
Every word is all I need
Just these pages turning

[Verse 2]
Blanket fort of paperbacks
The clock can wait, I won't look back
Lost in chapters, found in prose
The afternoon just softly goes

[Chorus]
Pages turning, slowly learning
All the lives I'll never lead
Pages turning, softly burning
Every word is all I need
Just these pages turning

[Bridge]
Some people chase the sun
I chase the perfect line
A sentence that unravels
Something timeless and divine

[Outro]
Pages turning, pages turning
Quietly, quietly
